overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through the desert Badlands toward Night City. The player drives along a paved highway past Joshua trees, abandoned encampments, and industrial wasteland before entering a rocky canyon that leads into the futuristic metropolis.

events.description: passing abandoned encampment with people and derelict vehicles visible on the right roadside
distant futuristic city skyline becomes more prominent and detailed ahead

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along desert highway with hands on steering wheel, maintaining high speed

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near abandoned vehicles at the roadside encampment

entered.detail: two-lane paved road stretching through arid landscape with yellow dividing lines
scattered desert trees with spiky branches dotting the sandy terrain
utility poles with wires running parallel to the highway
futuristic metropolis with tall spires and skyscrapers visible on the horizon
derelict cars and trucks parked at the roadside encampment

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with first-person driving through a sunlit desert highway, surrounded by Joshua trees and sandy terrain. Around 6 seconds, the vehicle passes an abandoned roadside encampment with NPCs standing near derelict vehicles. The distant cyberpunk city skyline grows increasingly visible ahead as the car maintains a steady speed along the open road.

events.description: large commercial billboards become visible along the right side of the highway
entering industrial wasteland area with visible trash piles and debris

agents.ego_description: cruising along the highway, passing billboards and industrial structures while approaching the city outskirts

entered.detail: large commercial advertising structures with colorful displays
heaps of garbage and debris accumulated along the roadside
tall metal electrical pylons with multiple power lines
abandoned buildings and warehouses in the distance

segments.scene_description: The drive continues through the industrial outskirts with large billboards appearing on the right side. The landscape transitions from natural desert to industrial wasteland with trash piles and transmission towers. The city skyline grows larger and more defined as the vehicle approaches, while the Joshua trees and abandoned encampment fade from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with power transmission lines

events.description: driving past large trash piles and industrial debris on both sides of the road
road surface becomes partially flooded with water reflecting the sky
navigating past construction barriers and equipment on the roadside

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through industrial wasteland with flooded road sections and construction zones

entered.detail: yellow industrial crane arm visible above the debris
stretches of water covering the asphalt surface with reflections
large cylindrical structures and conduits along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a heavily industrialized wasteland zone with massive trash piles, construction cranes, and transmission towers dominating the landscape. The road becomes partially flooded around 45 seconds, creating water reflections. The car passes construction barriers and industrial pipes while the city skyline continues to loom closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon entrance to cyberpunk city

events.description: entering narrow canyon pass with red rock walls on both sides
emerging from canyon into urban downtown with towering skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: driving through the narrow canyon pass between red rocks, then entering the city streets with tall buildings

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rocky cliffs forming a narrow passage
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings of the city center
multi-lane road with overpasses and modern infrastructure
illuminated commercial signage on building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from open wasteland to a narrow rocky canyon with steep red cliffs on both sides. The vehicle passes through the canyon entrance and emerges into the urban environment of Night City, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers, overpasses, and neon signs. The environment shifts from natural desert to dense cyberpunk metropolis as the drive continues into the city streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a sunlit desert that gradually transforms into a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins on an open highway surrounded by Joshua trees and sandy terrain, passing an abandoned roadside encampment as the distant city skyline first appears on the horizon. As the vehicle maintains its speed, the natural landscape shifts into an industrial wasteland characterized by large billboards, transmission towers, and massive piles of trash. The scene then progresses through a flooded industrial zone filled with construction cranes and pipes before the road narrows into a rocky canyon with steep red cliffs. Finally, the camera emerges from the canyon to enter Night City, where the environment abruptly shifts from red stone to a forest of towering glass skyscrapers and glowing neon signs.
